description: NELLIS AIR FORCE BASE, Nev. -- Country singer, Blake Shelton performs onstage during the Academy of Country Music USO concert at the Nellis sports pavilion April 2. Country music stars came to Nellis to participate in a charity skeet shooting event and perform a free concert for military members and their families. ( U.S Air Force Photo by Airman 1st Class Daniel Hughes)
